# link11waap_users (Data Source)

Lists all users across all organizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "link11waap_users" "all" {}

output "users" {
  value = data.link11waap_users.all.users
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) List of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `acl` (Number)
- `contact_name` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `mobile` (String)
- `org_id` (String)
- `org_name` (String)
